title: Grimorg

{{Quote|Oh Great and Well-Proportioned Bogga! Your enforcer ''Grimorg'' has arrived with prisoners!|One of Bogga's servants|<ref name="nomi2" />}}
'''Grimorg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Bogga's enforcer gang|enforcer]] in the employ of the [[Stenness Node]]–based [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] around [[3999 BBY|4,000 years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Grimorg was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] on Bogga's [[Core Galaxy Systems Dreadnaught|flagship]], [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']], and used the [[Warship/Legends|warship]] to hunt down beings who had crossed the Hutt crime lord. He also served as a palace enforcer for Bogga at the crime lord's [[Bogga's palace|estate]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Vo Dasha]].

In 4,000 BBY, Grimorg helped capture a [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|team]] of [[Ore/Legends|ore]]-siphoning [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], led by [[Finhead Stonebone]], who were attacking a [[Nessie]] [[Ithullan ore hauler|ore hauler]]. Grimorg brought Stonebone to Vo Dasha and left him at Bogga's mercy. Bogga spared Stonebone and forced him to take a team of pirates and enforcers, which included Grimorg, to [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]] to retrieve a lost shipment of [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] and eliminate Bogga's sworn enemy, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Thon]]. Grimorg traveled with the group to Ambria, and the [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] were soon found in [[Ambria Jedi Enclave|Master Thon's compound]]. Surprisingly, Thon refused to put up a fight, and Grimorg assisted in securing him to be taken back to Bogga. However, while Grimorg was doing this, the group was [[Skirmish on Ambria|attacked]] by Thon's [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi apprentice]], [[Nomi Sunrider]]. Sunrider cut a swath through the invading crew with her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], and Grimorg was soon [[Death/Legends|struck down]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Open up—I got prisoners for Bogga's pleasure!|Grimorg|<ref name="nomi2" />}}
Grimorg, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]], worked as an [[Bogga's enforcer gang|enforcer]] for the [[Stenness Node]]–based [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] around [[3999 BBY|4,000 years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="nomi2" /> Grimorg was one of Bogga's most loyal palace enforcers and spent most of his [[Time/Legends|time]] hunting down and capturing individuals who crossed the crime lord. He was also able to convince several of his [[Grimorg's clan|Weequay clan]] members to join Bogga's enforcer gang. Grimorg's group was extremely successful, and as of 3999 BBY, Grimorg had not failed in any of his hunts.<ref name="companion">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''</ref> When searching for a target, Grimorg served aboard Bogga's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Core Galaxy Systems Dreadnaught|dreadnought]] [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']], where he had the unenviable job of keeping control of the many Weequays, [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]], [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinians]], and [[Vodran (species)/Legends|Vodrans]] who served as crew hands and boarding [[Troop/Legends|troops]].<ref name="egvv">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>

In 3999 BBY, Grimorg, while serving on the ''Enforcer One'', came across a [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|group]] of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] in the process of siphoning valuable [[Ore/Legends|ore]] from a [[Nessie]] [[Ithullan ore hauler|Ithullian ore hauler]] in the Stenness Node. The ''Enforcer One'' tasked one of Bogga's [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], [[Dreebo]], to defend the [[Gruna's ore hauler|ore hauler]], but Dreebo's [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was quickly destroyed. As the pirates, led by [[Finhead Stonebone]], boarded the hauler, the ''Enforcer One'' appeared in the vicinity and caught the [[Marauder Starjacker|pirate ship]] in its [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]]. With the pirates captured, Grimorg ordered that the ''Enforcer One'' go to [[Bogga's palace|Bogga's estate]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Vo Dasha]]. Upon landing on the moon, Grimorg brought a chained Stonebone, along with Stonebone's pirate associates, to Bogga. Grimorg shoved Stonebone into the dirt in front of the crime lord, leaving the pirate's fate in Bogga's hands. Bogga offered the pirate a chance to be redeemed, telling him that his crimes would be forgiven if he performed a task—going to the desolate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]] to retrieve a lost shipment of [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] and eliminate Bogga's sworn enemy, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Thon]]. Stonebone initially refused, prompting Bogga to unleash his [[hssiss]] pet, [[Ktriss]], on Stonebone's [[First Mate/Legends|first mate]], [[Roko]].<ref name="nomi2" /> Ktriss slaughtered Roko, scaring Stonebone into consenting to Bogga's offer.<ref name="nomi3" />

After Stonebone's agreement, a group consisting of [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] pirates and Hutt enforcers was formed to journey to Thon's [[Ambria Jedi Enclave|compound]] on the Ambria. Grimorg joined the menagerie, and the group set out for Ambria in a convoy containing several [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barges]]. As the convoy traveled across the wastes of Ambria, Grimorg sighted Thon, along with his [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi apprentice]], [[Nomi Sunrider]], on the planet's surface. Grimorg ordered the barge's [[Gunner/Legends|gunmen]] to [[Laser/Legends|fire]] on the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], but Thon was able to deflect the salvos with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. The convoy touched down near Thon's compound, and to their great surprise, Thon refused to fight back. As Grimorg worked to secure Thon and bring him onto their barge as a [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]], one of Bogga's enforcers discovered the Adegan [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] in the compound. However, the discovery triggered a brawl between the enforcers and the pirates over who would receive credit for the retrieval of the jewels. Grimorg did not directly participate in the showdown at first, as he was still attending to the captive Jedi Master. Although he soon joined in, he fared poorly and was thrown to the ground by one of Stonebone's pirates. While the two groups were distracted by the brawl, Sunrider activated her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and attacked them. Despite Grimorg's encouragement of the band to kill the Jedi, he was soon [[Death/Legends|slain]] by Sunrider.<ref name="nomi3" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|There! There's the ''beast'' coming across the ledges! ''Blast him!''|Grimorg|<ref name="nomi3" />}}
Grimorg was very gruff and rude toward his prey and held great disdain for Bogga the Hutt's opponents, especially pirates. He was very loyal to Bogga, who saw him as capable enough to be one of his top men.<ref name="nomi2" /> He despised Thon, calling the [[Tchuukthai]] Jedi Master "a beast." However, he held respect for Thon's abilities in combat.<ref name="nomi3" />

==Skills and abilities==
Wielding a [[Pulse-wave blaster|pulse-wave rifle]] in combat, Grimorg was an extremely successful enforcer in the employ of Bogga. He and his Weequay clan members possessed a valuable skill that they called [[short-range communication]]. This ability allowed Weequays of the same clan to communicate through complex combinations of [[Pheromone/Legends|pheromones]]. Short-range communication allowed Grimorg and his clan members to easily corral and corner their prey.<ref name="companion" />

==Behind the scenes==
Grimorg first appears in the [[Tales of the Jedi 4|second issue]] of ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Saga of Nomi Sunrider]]'', the second story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Tom Veitch]] and released over late [[1993]] to early [[1994]]. He later reappears in the [[Tales of the Jedi 5|third and final issue]] of the arc, in which he is killed.<ref name="nomi3" /> In these issues, he is illustrated by [[David Roach]].<ref name="nomi2" /><ref name="nomi3" /> Further information on Grimorg is given in the [[1996]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'',<ref name="egvv" /> and he was later given entries in the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[1998]],<ref name="swe">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> the third edition of ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' in [[2000]],<ref name="agswu">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''</ref> and ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]].<ref name="cswe">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
